title: Youngever 15 Pack Plastic Fast Food Baskets, Re-usable Snack Baskets, Food Baskets for Popcorn, Chips, Snacks, 5 Assorted Colors (Rectangular Shape)
features: Plastic Fast Food Baskets - Set of 15 plastic oval snack baskets in 5 Assorted Rainbow Colors. Three baskets in each color.
USAGE SAFE - Kids Safe, Microwave safe. Dishwasher safe, 100% non-toxic. Durable and reusable. NO LEAD. NO BPA.

GREAT FOR - Everyday meals, Cafe, Restaurant, Self-service area, Outdoor, Party, Kids, Home event, Patio, Games, Poolside, Picnic, Camping, RV, Beach and many more. Break-Resistant and Durable material is a safer alternative to glass or disposable dining ware.
SIZE – 21.5cm L x 15cm W x 3cm H. Stackable and easy to store.
